text.value:
There are multiple README.md files in the Azure REST API specifications repository. These files cover different components and tools used within the repository. Here are some highlights from the first page of search results:

1. **eng/tools/lint-diff/README.md**: Provides details about the tool for linting differences in API specifications.
   - [View File](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/ad2d848416d5b898870a6855790e92057c0f2d2d/eng/tools/lint-diff/README.md)

2. **specification/app/data-plane/readme.md**: Contains information related to data plane API specifications for Azure applications.
   - [View File](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/ad2d848416d5b898870a6855790e92057c0f2d2d/specification/app/data-plane/readme.md)

3. **documentation/samplefiles/README.md**: Includes examples and sample files which demonstrate usage scenarios and implementations.
   - [View File](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/ad2d848416d5b898870a6855790e92057c0f2d2d/documentation/samplefiles/README.md)

4. **specification/terraform/resource-manager/readme.md**: Contains specifications related to Terraform resource management.
   - [View File](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/ad2d848416d5b898870a6855790e92057c0f2d2d/specification/terraform/resource-manager/readme.md)

Each README.md file has a specific context and purpose, typically explaining the components, usage, and guidelines for the associated part of the project. If you have a particular area of interest, let me know, and I can provide more detailed information or look into specific files for you.
Please summarize the Azure REST API specifications Readme
